name: INTERMAGNET Definitive and Quasi-definitive Magnetic Observatory Data
provider: INTERMAGNET consortium; geomagnetic information nodes including BGS, IPGP, USGS, Kyoto
theme_raw: worldwide magnetic observatory data
coverage: global observatory network
license: CC-BY-NC / INTERMAGNET conditions of use
formats: IAGA2002, CDF, CSV-like downloads, API/portal products
access: portal / API / registration-free data viewer
doi_or_citation: INTERMAGNET annual definitive data and IRDS releases
time_span: 1991-present for definitive digital releases; near-real-time reported data varies by observatory
notes: Canonical backbone source for ground vector magnetic-field observations. The BGS GIN data viewer is used as a stable access route for INTERMAGNET observatory downloads. Refreshed in v038 with Brazil Vassouras (VSS) evidence: the BGS GIN form for observatoryIagaCode=VSS exposes XML/JSON/COVJSON/HTML/IAGA-2002/ImagCDF/IMF/WDC and magnetogram downloads, and a tested IAGA-2002 request returned VSS 1-minute provisional data. Refreshed in v040 with Africa observatory service evidence for TAM and HER. BGS GIN forms expose multi-format downloads for both, and tested IAGA-2002 requests returned 1-minute data. Refreshed in v116 with GFZ/DataCite annual definitive data package evidence for 2014: DOI 10.5880/INTERMAGNET.2014 resolves to a GFZ landing page, the GFZ download directory contains 2014_USB.tar.gz, md5sum and readme files, and DataCite describes minute/hourly/daily vectors, baselines, K indices and annual means for INTERMAGNET observatories worldwide. Refreshed in v117 with 2013 GFZ annual package evidence and an explicit IRDS dedup boundary: 2016-2019 GFZ IRDS cumulative packages are covered by the canonical IRDS 2020 direct-download row rather than added as separate rows.
seen_in_passes: geomagnetic-v001-foundation; geomagnetic-v038-brazil-geomag-vss-service; geomagnetic-v040-africa-tamanrasset-hermanus-refresh; v116 GFZ INTERMAGNET 2014 annual package audit; v117 GFZ 2013 annual package and IRDS dedup audit
desc_zh: INTERMAGNET 汇集全球磁观测台的标准化地磁场时间序列，包含最终定标、准最终和近实时产品。它是地磁主场建模、空间天气扰动分析、磁暴研究和观测台数据互校的核心来源。首批目录采用 BGS GIN 数据查看器作为稳定访问入口。
desc_en: INTERMAGNET provides standardized geomagnetic observatory time series from a global network of magnetic observatories, including definitive, quasi-definitive, and reported data products. The data are central to main-field modeling, space-weather disturbance analysis, storm studies, and intercomparison of observatory records. This atlas row uses the BGS GIN viewer as a stable access path for discovery and download.
access_status: open with attribution and non-commercial conditions
source_type: international observatory network
evidence: INTERMAGNET/BGS GIN data viewer exposes observatory selections and downloads. In v038, the BGS GIN VSS form and a direct IAGA-2002 service URL were checked alive; the response header identified Source of Data ON and GFZ, Station Vassouras, IAGA Code VSS, and XYZF fields. In v040, BGS GIN TAM and HER forms plus direct IAGA-2002 service URLs were checked alive. TAM response identified CRAAG/IPGP and HER response identified Hermanus Magnetic Observatory. In v116, https://doi.org/10.5880/INTERMAGNET.2014 resolved to the GFZ landing page Global magnetic observatory data 2014. https://datapub.gfz-potsdam.de/download/10.5880.INTERMAGNET.2014/ returned a browsable directory with 2014_USB.tar.gz (829M), 2014_USB.tar.gz.md5sum, and readme_INTERMAGNET_2014.txt.txt. DataCite API for the DOI returned Dataset metadata with collected date 2014-01-01/2014-12-31 and an abstract describing minute, hourly, daily vector values, observatory baselines, K indices and annual means. In v117, DataCite and GFZ pages for DOI 10.5880/INTERMAGNET.2013 verified a 2013 annual definitive digital data package with a GFZ datapub directory listing 2013_DVD.tar.gz, checksum and readme. GFZ/DataCite pages for IRDS 2016-2019 were checked as cumulative IRDS releases and deduplicated into the existing IRDS 2020 row.
scale: 1-minute and 1-second observatory cadence depending on product
feature_count: 100+ observatories historically represented
file_size: varies by observatory and interval

name: NOAA NCEI World Magnetic Model 2025
provider: NOAA NCEI; British Geological Survey; NGA; UK Defence Geographic Centre
theme_raw: World Magnetic Model
coverage: global
license: public domain / U.S. government material notice
formats: COF coefficient file, source code, calculators, maps, documentation
access: direct download / web calculators
doi_or_citation: https://doi.org/10.25921/aqfd-sd83
notes: Navigation-standard predictive geomagnetic model. NCEI page states WMM2025 was released on 2024-12-17 and remains valid until late 2029.
desc_zh: World Magnetic Model 2025 是面向导航、姿态和航向参考的全球地磁主场预测模型。它提供高斯系数、软件、计算器和技术报告，可计算磁偏角、倾角、总场强及年变化等量。该模型适合导航和工程基准，不应用作历史回溯主场模型。
desc_en: The World Magnetic Model 2025 is the global predictive geomagnetic main-field model used for navigation, attitude, and heading reference. It provides coefficient files, software, calculators, maps, and documentation for magnetic declination, inclination, total intensity, vector components, and secular variation. It is a navigation-standard model for the 2025-2030 epoch rather than a historical retrospective field series.
source_type: official model product
evidence: NCEI product page lists WMM2025 coefficient file, software, calculators, citation DOI, and public-domain notice.
scale: spherical harmonic degree/order 12; WMMHR up to degree 15
feature_count: Gauss coefficients and secular variation coefficients
file_size: small coefficient/software packages

name: International Geomagnetic Reference Field 14
provider: IAGA Working Group V-MOD; NOAA NCEI distribution
theme_raw: IGRF-14
coverage: global
license: public domain for NCEI-distributed software; model citation requested
formats: text coefficients, spreadsheet, COF, source code, calculators
access: direct download / web calculators
doi_or_citation: Alken et al. 2021, Earth Planets Space, doi:10.1186/s40623-020-01288-x; IGRF-14 coefficients finalized November 2024
notes: IAGA-maintained international reference model for Earth's main magnetic field. NCEI provides IGRF-14 coefficients and calculation software.
desc_zh: IGRF 是国际地磁学与高空大气物理学协会维护的地磁主场标准数学描述。第 14 代模型提供 1900 年以来的主场和年变率系数，是深部地球、地壳、 电离层和磁层研究中常用的背景场。NCEI 页面提供系数、程序和计算器入口。
desc_en: The International Geomagnetic Reference Field is the IAGA-maintained standard mathematical description of Earth's main magnetic field. The 14th generation provides coefficients and software for retrospective and predictive main-field calculations and is widely used as a background field in deep Earth, crustal, ionospheric, and magnetospheric studies. NCEI distributes the coefficients, programs, and calculators.
source_type: international model product
evidence: NCEI IGRF page lists IGRF-14 coefficient downloads, software, calculators, and model description.
scale: spherical harmonic degree 13 for IGRF-14
feature_count: main-field and secular-variation coefficients by epoch
file_size: small coefficient/software packages

name: NOAA NCEI Enhanced Magnetic Model 2017
provider: NOAA NCEI
theme_raw: EMM2017
coverage: global
license: NOAA open data / public access with citation
formats: model coefficients, mesh package, software
access: survey-gated direct download
doi_or_citation: NCEI Enhanced Magnetic Model product documentation
notes: Higher-resolution model than WMM; includes crustal and core parts and uses EMAG2-v3 for the crustal field.
desc_zh: Enhanced Magnetic Model 2017 是 NOAA NCEI 发布的高分辨率地磁场模型，结合卫星、海洋、航空和地面磁测资料。它把主场和地壳场放在同一产品中，分辨率高于 WMM，适合需要较细磁异常背景的导航、资源和地球物理分析。下载入口需要填写用途调查。
desc_en: The Enhanced Magnetic Model 2017 is a high-resolution geomagnetic field model from NOAA NCEI compiled from satellite, marine, aeromagnetic, and ground magnetic surveys. It combines core and crustal field components and resolves much shorter wavelengths than WMM, supporting navigation, resource, and geophysical applications that need a more detailed magnetic background. Downloads are mediated by an intended-use survey.
source_type: official model product
evidence: NCEI EMM page documents EMM2017 coefficients, mesh package, model validity, and source data.
scale: degree/order 790; about 51 km wavelength
feature_count: global spherical harmonic model plus mesh distribution
file_size: 24.5 MB coefficients/software; 14 GB mesh package

name: Kyoto WDC Geomagnetic Equatorial Dst Index
provider: World Data Center for Geomagnetism, Kyoto University
theme_raw: Dst index
coverage: global low-latitude ring-current index
license: custom academic data-use terms / citation requested
formats: HTML tables, text downloads, plots; CDPP-AMDA HAPI/SPASE hourly Dst service
access: direct download / web forms; CDPP-AMDA ground-based-dst HAPI endpoint provides an additional open API route
doi_or_citation: WDC for Geomagnetism, Kyoto Dst index service
notes: Canonical Dst index service. The page distinguishes quicklook, provisional, and final Dst streams. In v162, CDPP-AMDA ground-based-dst was reviewed as an open HAPI/SPASE route for Kyoto/WDC Dst via ISGI/UNISTRA and added as supporting API evidence rather than a duplicate row.
desc_zh: 京都大学 WDC 的 Dst 指数是衡量地磁赤道环电流扰动强度的经典小时指数。页面提供实时、临时和最终版本，并支持绘图与数据下载。它是磁暴识别、太阳风-磁层耦合研究和空间天气建模的基础时间序列。
desc_en: The Kyoto WDC Dst index is the canonical hourly equatorial geomagnetic activity index used to track ring-current disturbances and magnetic storms. The service separates real-time quicklook, provisional, and final versions and provides plotting and data download access. It is a fundamental time series for storm classification, solar-wind-magnetosphere coupling studies, and space-weather modeling.
source_type: world data center index service
evidence: Kyoto Dst home page lists quicklook, provisional, final Dst, and hourly plot/download access. In v162, AMDA HAPI info for ground-based-dst returned 1970-01-01T01:00:00Z to 2026-06-08T23:00:00Z, cadence PT1H, provider WDC Kyoto via ISGI/UNISTRA, and resourceID spase://CNES/NumericalData/CDPP-AMDA/Indices/Ground_Based/ground-based-dst. The SPASE page returned AccessRights Open, MeasurementType MagneticField, ObservedRegion Earth.Magnetosphere.Main, WDC Kyoto/ISGI citation DOI 10.17593/14515-74000, and CC BY license text. A sample HAPI query for 2024-01-01 returned hourly dst values.
scale: hourly index
feature_count: continuous hourly index records by version
file_size: small text tables by interval

name: Kyoto WDC Auroral Electrojet AE, AU, AL, AO Indices
provider: World Data Center for Geomagnetism, Kyoto University
theme_raw: AE/AU/AL/AO indices
coverage: auroral-zone observatory network
license: custom academic data-use terms / citation requested

access: direct download / web forms; CDPP-AMDA ground-based-aei HAPI endpoint provides an additional open API route
doi_or_citation: WDC for Geomagnetism, Kyoto AE index service
notes: Canonical auroral electrojet index service; real-time AE may have different download availability from final/provisional data. In v162, CDPP-AMDA ground-based-aei was reviewed as an open HAPI/SPASE route for Kyoto/WDC auroral electrojet indices via ISGI/UNISTRA and added as supporting API evidence rather than a duplicate row.
desc_zh: 京都 WDC 的 AE、AU、AL、AO 指数描述极光带电流体系的扰动，是磁层亚暴和高纬电流研究的重要数据。服务按版本提供绘图和下载入口，适合与太阳风、Dst、Kp 等指数联合分析。不同实时流的开放性和可下载性需按页面说明区分。
desc_en: Kyoto WDC's AE, AU, AL, and AO indices describe auroral electrojet activity and are core data products for magnetospheric substorm and high-latitude current studies. The service provides versioned plotting and download access and is commonly combined with solar-wind, Dst, and Kp records. Real-time and final streams should be treated separately because availability differs by product.
source_type: world data center index service
evidence: Kyoto AE directory is the WDC landing page for auroral electrojet indices. In v162, AMDA HAPI info for ground-based-aei returned 1975-01-01T00:00:00Z to 2026-05-03T23:59:00Z, cadence PT1M, provider WDC Kyoto via ISGI/UNISTRA, and resourceID spase://CNES/NumericalData/CDPP-AMDA/Indices/Ground_Based/ground-based-aei. The SPASE page returned AccessRights Open, MeasurementType MagneticField, ObservedRegion Earth.NearSurface.AuroralRegion, WDC Kyoto/ISGI citation DOI 10.17593/15031-54800, and CC BY license text. A sample HAPI query for 2024-01-01 returned AE, AU, AL, AO, and ap_wdc values.
scale: minute/hourly index products depending on stream
feature_count: AE, AU, AL, AO index families
file_size: small text tables by interval

provider: International Service of Geomagnetic Indices; EOST/University of Strasbourg

license: custom ISGI rules and policy / citation requested

access: web form / email-mediated download; selected ISGI/Kyoto/PC index families are mirrored as open CDPP-AMDA HAPI services
doi_or_citation: ISGI geomagnetic indices service
time_span: aa since 1868; Kp since 1932; Dst and AE since 1957; other indices vary
notes: Single access point for IAGA-endorsed indices and events including aa, am, Kp, Dst, PCN/PCS, AE/AU/AL/AO, SC, SFE, Q-days/D-days, and CK-days. Refreshed in v037 with South America observatory-index evidence pages for Huancayo (HUA), Pilar (PIL), Orcadas del Sur (ORC), Trelew (TRW), and Vassouras (VSS), all alive during candidate checks. These are treated as observatory/index metadata and companion discovery pages, not separate raw-data rows. Refreshed in v040 with Africa observatory-index metadata pages for Tamanrasset (TAM) and Hermanus (HER). HER contributes to am, Dst, and ASY indices; TAM is listed as an INTERMAGNET member with BCMT website. V120 reviewed Zenodo DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20839883 as a separate event-derived HUA-KOU EEJ index dataset for 1 January 2025; it is documented as a distinct manuscript-supporting file rather than merged into this broader service/source-data row. V162 reviewed CDPP-AMDA HAPI/SPASE index services for aa, Dst, AE-family, and PCN/PCS. Dedicated aa and PC rows were added because they expose distinct direct HAPI services; Dst and AE were retained under Kyoto canonical rows with AMDA evidence.
seen_in_passes: geomagnetic-v001-foundation; geomagnetic-v037-argentina-pilar-smn-isgi-refresh; geomagnetic-v040-africa-tamanrasset-hermanus-refresh; v120 HUA-KOU EEJ Zenodo dedup boundary; geomagnetic-v162-amda-ground-index-hapi-review
desc_zh: ISGI 提供 IAGA 认可的地磁指数和显著磁事件下载，覆盖 aa、am、Kp、Dst、PC、AE 系列以及 SC、SFE 等事件目录。页面支持 IAGA2002-like、JSON 和 VOTable 等输出格式，但下载流程需要提交邮箱。它适合作为空间天气长期指数的统一入口。
desc_en: The International Service of Geomagnetic Indices provides access to IAGA-endorsed geomagnetic indices and remarkable magnetic events, including aa, am, Kp, Dst, PC, AE-family indices, SC, SFE, quiet/disturbed days, and CK days. The download page supports IAGA2002-like, JSON, and VOTable outputs, with an email step in the service workflow. It is a useful consolidated access point for long-running space-weather index series.
source_type: international index service
evidence: ISGI data download page lists data types, date ranges, and output formats. In v037, ISGI observatory pages for HUA, PIL, ORC, TRW, and VSS were checked alive and showed IAGA codes, country/location, open-close dates, and index/INTERMAGNET companion links where applicable. In v040, ISGI observatory pages for TAM and HER were checked alive and showed IAGA codes, country/location, open-close dates, index contributions or INTERMAGNET links. V120 dedup boundary: Zenodo record 20839883 contains a small CC-BY-4.0 text file of 1-minute HUA-KOU EEJ values for one geomagnetic storm and is not treated as a duplicate of this broader data service/source record. V162 evidence: CDPP-AMDA HAPI/SPASE services ground-based-aa, ground-based-dst, ground-based-aei, and indices-pc-all were verified alive with sample data and open SPASE metadata.
scale: index-specific cadence
feature_count: multiple endorsed index and event families
file_size: small tables by query

provider: GFZ German Research Centre for Geosciences

doi_or_citation: GFZ Kp index service; Hpo V3.0 DOI 10.5880/Hpo.0003
time_span: Kp since 1932; Hpo V3.0 extends Hp30/Hp60 products with values from 1984 onward and current yearly updates
notes: Official GFZ service for planetary Kp and derived products. Refreshed in v011 with the GFZ Hpo V3.0 DOI record, which identifies the current Hpo archive and documents the 2024 version update.
desc_zh: GFZ 的 Kp 数据服务提供行星 Kp 及 ap、Ap、Cp、C9 和 Hp30/Hp60 等派生指数。Kp 是三小时全球地磁活动标准指数，Hp30/Hp60 则面向更高时间分辨率的强扰动刻画。v011 补充 GFZ Hpo V3.0 DOI 记录：该版本以 13 个贡献磁台的近实时数据为基础，并将 Hpo 作为可持续增长的年度文件归档。
desc_en: GFZ's Kp data service provides the planetary Kp index and related ap, Ap, Cp, C9, Hp30, and Hp60 products. Kp is the standard three-hour global geomagnetic activity index, while Hp30 and Hp60 offer higher-cadence representations of intense disturbances. v011 adds the GFZ Hpo V3.0 DOI evidence, which identifies the current Hpo archive based on near-real-time data from 13 contributing observatories and yearly growing files.
source_type: official index service
evidence: GFZ Kp data service is the official distribution point for Kp and related indices. GFZ Hpo V3.0 DOI record 10.5880/Hpo.0003 states that Hp30/ap30 and Hp60/ap60 files are based on near-real-time data from 13 contributing observatories, are organized by year, and were updated as version 3.0 in 2024.
scale: 3-hour Kp; 30-minute and 60-minute Hpo products from 13 contributing observatories
feature_count: planetary index families
file_size: small tables by interval

desc_zh: NOAA SWPC 的 Planetary K-index 产品面向空间天气运行监测，显示当前和近期全球地磁活动水平。它适合值班、告警和快速背景判断，而长期历史研究应优先使用 GFZ、ISGI 或 WDC 归档产品。该条作为运行型地磁指数入口收录。
desc_en: NOAA SWPC's Planetary K-index product is an operational space-weather page showing current and recent global geomagnetic activity. It is useful for monitoring, alerting, and rapid context, while long-term historical studies should prefer archival services such as GFZ, ISGI, or WDC products. This row captures the operational access route rather than a full archive.
source_type: operational monitoring product
evidence: SWPC maintains a public Planetary K-index operational product page.
scale: 3-hour planetary K-index display
feature_count: current and recent index values
file_size: web product

desc_zh: VirES for Swarm 是 ESA Swarm 星座磁场产品的交互式访问和 API 平台。它提供 1 Hz 低分辨率 VFM/ASM 磁场数据、50 Hz 高分辨率 VFM 数据，以及 FAC、AEJ、ULF 等二级产品。该服务适合卫星地磁场建模、磁层-电离层电流分析和与地面台站数据联合研究。
desc_en: VirES for Swarm is the interactive and API-based access platform for ESA Swarm magnetic-field products. It exposes 1 Hz low-resolution VFM/ASM magnetic data, 50 Hz high-resolution VFM data, and many Level-2 current and field products such as FAC, AEJ, and ULF datasets. The service supports satellite geomagnetic modeling, magnetosphere-ionosphere current analysis, and combined use with ground observatory data.
source_type: satellite mission data platform
evidence: VirES page lists Swarm magnetic products, web client, Python client, HAPI access, and data availability.
scale: 1 Hz and 50 Hz magnetic products; global orbital coverage
feature_count: multi-product Swarm catalogue

license: NASA open data / citation requested

desc_zh: OMNIWeb 汇集近地太阳风、行星际磁场和常用地磁指数，是研究太阳风驱动地磁扰动的基础数据入口。它通过网页查询和文件下载提供多年代时间序列，可与 Dst、Kp、AE 等指数联合使用。该条作为地磁活动解释和建模的外部驱动数据源收录。
desc_en: OMNIWeb integrates near-Earth solar-wind, interplanetary magnetic-field, and common geomagnetic-index time series. It is a foundational access point for studying how upstream solar-wind drivers produce geomagnetic disturbances, and it supports web queries and downloadable multi-decadal records. This row is included as a key context dataset for interpreting and modeling geomagnetic activity.
source_type: space physics data service
evidence: OMNIWeb data page provides access to OMNI solar-wind and geomagnetic-index datasets.
scale: hourly and higher-cadence time series
feature_count: solar-wind, IMF, and geomagnetic variables
file_size: query-dependent

seen_in_passes: geomagnetic-v001-foundation; v104 BGS subpage review and global survey API split-out; v106 BGS monthly bulletins and historical yearbooks split-out; v107 hourly means CGI negative check and WDC HAPI redirect; v118 BGS NGDC cited-data refinement
desc_zh: BGS 地磁数据服务提供英国地磁观测台数据、模型计算和相关地磁服务入口。它既是国家级观测数据来源，也与 WMM、INTERMAGNET 等国际基础设施相关。目录将其作为区域权威台站与模型服务的代表性入口。
desc_en: The BGS geomagnetic data service provides access to UK magnetic observatory data, model calculators, and related geomagnetic services. It is both a national authority for observatory records and a participant in international infrastructure such as WMM and INTERMAGNET. The atlas includes it as a regional authoritative portal for observatory and model data.
source_type: national geomagnetic data service
evidence: BGS data service landing page organizes geomagnetic data and services. In v104, BGS subpages for annual means, K indices, aa index, ap index, current UK conditions, hourly means, monthly bulletins, yearbooks, and global survey data were checked alive. In v038, WDC observatory information pages for VSS and TTB were checked alive and link to WDC Observatory Data Portal plotting/download access. In v040, WDC observatory information pages for TAM and HER were checked alive and link to WDC Observatory Data Portal plotting/download access. The schema states that data are available in IAGA-2002, WDC, XML, JSON, and CSV formats as zipped downloads or text endpoints. Verified samples included /metadata/observatory-metadata/esk with attributes/instruments/locations/persons, /data/data-availability/hour for ESK in Jan-Feb 2022, /data/text-data/hour/esk returning CSV hourly records for January 2022, and /data/zipped-data/hour/esk returning a zip containing esk2022-01.csv, request summary, and acknowledgement file. In v107, https://wdcapi.bgs.ac.uk/hapi/about returned HAPI 3.2 metadata stating that WDC Edinburgh provides minute, hour, day, month, year and K-index data on a best-quality definitive basis. /hapi/catalog returned dataset IDs such as aaa/PT1H/hdz and many other code/cadence/orientation combinations. /hapi/info?dataset=esk/PT1H/hdz reported startDate 1911-01-01, stopDate 2025-01-01, cadence PT1H, maxRequestDuration P50Y, HDZ field-vector labels, coordinates and acknowledgement citation. LER and HAD PT1H HDZ info calls similarly returned station-specific metadata. /hapi/data?dataset=esk/PT1H/hdz&start=2024-01-01T00:00:00Z&stop=2024-01-02T00:00:00Z returned 24 hourly records in JSON and CSV with H, D, Z values and original format Intermagnet Binary. In v110, /metadata/observatory-metadata/ebr returned Ebro metadata with Roquetes, Spain and instrument history, while /metadata/observatory-metadata/liv returned Livingston Island metadata with Ebro Observatory acknowledgement and instrument history. /hapi/info?dataset=ebr/PT1H/hdz returned HAPI 3.2 metadata with startDate 1957-07-01, stopDate 2026-01-01, cadence PT1H and HDZ vector fields. /hapi/info?dataset=liv/PT1H/hdz returned startDate 1996-12-01, stopDate 2026-01-01, coordinates -62.662/299.605 and HDZ vector fields. /hapi/data for LIV on 2014-01-01 in CSV returned 24 hourly records with H, D, Z values and original format Intermagnet Binary.

desc_zh: THEMIS GMAG 页面介绍 THEMIS 地面磁力仪和多个贡献阵列的数据入口，包括 CARISMA、GIMA、MACCS、AUTUMN、PENGUIn 等。v121 进一步验证了 Berkeley 直接下载树：`/data/themis/thg/l2/mag/` 列出台站目录和站点码文件，ATHA 台站目录按年份组织，2024 目录包含每日 CDF 文件和 CHECKSUMS。它是从任务视角获取地面磁力仪数据的枢纽，适合与 THEMIS 卫星观测联合分析；使用时需要按具体阵列规则致谢。 v135 进一步补充 SPDF/CDAWeb HAPI 证据：CDAWeb HAPI 目录列出大量 `THG_L2_MAG_*` 台站级产品，样例 `THG_L2_MAG_ATHA` 提供 HEZ 矢量磁场扰动及 H/E/Z 分量，覆盖 2008-02-05 至 2026-06-22。
desc_en: The THEMIS GMAG page documents THEMIS ground-based magnetometers and access to many contributing arrays, including CARISMA, GIMA, MACCS, AUTUMN, and PENGUIn. V121 additionally verifies the Berkeley direct download tree: `/data/themis/thg/l2/mag/` lists station directories and a station-code file, the ATHA station directory is organized by year, and the 2024 directory exposes daily CDF files plus CHECKSUMS. It is a mission-oriented hub for ground magnetometer data used together with THEMIS satellite observations; users should acknowledge the specific contributing arrays according to their rules. V135 adds SPDF/CDAWeb HAPI evidence: the CDAWeb HAPI catalog lists many `THG_L2_MAG_*` station-level products, and the sample `THG_L2_MAG_ATHA` product exposes HEZ magnetic-field variations and H/E/Z components from 2008-02-05 to 2026-06-22.
source_type: mission ground network portal
evidence: THEMIS GMAG instrument page lists measurement properties and contributing networks with data availability. V121 evidence: https://themis.igpp.ucla.edu/data.shtml returned 200 as the mission data page. https://themis.ssl.berkeley.edu/data/themis/thg/l2/mag/ returned 200 and listed Station-Code-19700101.txt plus station directories such as abk, akul, amd, amer, arct and atha. https://themis.ssl.berkeley.edu/data/themis/thg/l2/mag/Station-Code-19700101.txt returned 200 text/plain with station codes, geographic and geomagnetic coordinates. https://themis.ssl.berkeley.edu/data/themis/thg/l2/mag/atha/ returned 200 and listed year folders including 2004 and 2008-2013. https://themis.ssl.berkeley.edu/data/themis/thg/l2/mag/atha/2024/ returned 200 and listed CHECKSUMS and daily files such as thg_l2_mag_atha_20240101_v01.cdf. V121 lychee verified the mission data page, GMAG instrument page, direct MAG tree, station-code file, ATHA station/year directories, CHECKSUMS and a sample CDF URL. V135 evidence: CDAWeb HAPI catalog returned 200 and contained 210 THG products including numerous THG_L2_MAG_* station IDs. https://cdaweb.gsfc.nasa.gov/hapi/info?id=THG_L2_MAG_ATHA returned 200 and lists Time, thg_mag_atha magnetic field variation B in HEZ vector components, thg_magh_atha local magnetic north H, thg_magd_atha local magnetic east E, and thg_magz_atha local vertical down Z components, with startDate 2008-02-05T00:00:00Z and stopDate 2026-06-22T23:59:59Z. A HAPI sample request outside the available date range returned a well-formed HAPI 1201 no-data response, confirming service behavior even when no data exist for a range. SPASE guessed THEMIS/Ground/Magnetometer paths returned 404, so HAPI/CDAWeb and THEMIS mission URLs remain the authoritative access evidence.

scale: 2 samples/second for many THEMIS GMAGs; SPDF THG_L2_MAG_* HAPI products expose station-specific time spans and HEZ/H/E/Z components

notes: Refreshed in v101 after a WDC Kyoto field-service deep review. The broad WDC Kyoto row is retained as the canonical umbrella for observatory field-data services, while narrower Kyoto index rows cover Dst, AE, ASY/SYM, and Q/D-days separately. caplot exposes a POST catalogue search and plot/data output service for hourly, 1-minute, 1-second, and analogue record image holdings; catmap exposes observatory metadata and monthly/yearly availability; quicklook pages expose real-time monthly field-data views with non-commercial monitoring-only cautions; SGAMYA documents Shigaraki and Mineyama 1-second quicklook data but notes system/service limitations and unremoved artificial noise. Refreshed again in v102: hyplt hourly-value GET CGI output was directly tested for Kakioka/KAK January 2020 and returned a generated WDC-format `.dat` file. mdplt and shplt were also tested for KAK in 1995, 2000, 2010, and 2020 windows but returned No Data or provisional-output messages; those pages remain documented as official service forms but not claimed as successfully sampled numeric downloads in this phase.
seen_in_passes: geomagnetic-v004-national-satellite-index; v101 WDC Kyoto field-service endpoint refresh (caplot/catmap/quicklook/SGAMYA); v102 WDC Kyoto hyplt direct hourly-output verification and mdplt/shplt negative samples
desc_zh: WDC Kyoto 的地磁场数据服务是京都世界地磁数据中心的观测站场数据总入口，区别于 Dst、AE、ASY/SYM 等指数专页。它通过 catmap 提供在线数据目录、观测站信息和月/年可用性检索，通过 caplot/hyplt 提供小时值的绘图和数据输出；本轮已直接验证 Kakioka/KAK 2020 年 1 月小时值请求可生成 WDC 格式 `.dat` 数据文件。mdplt 与 shplt 分别提供 1 分钟和 1 秒数据输出表单及格式说明，但本轮对 KAK 多个年份窗口的抽样返回 No Data 或 provisional-output 提示，因此暂不声称已验证这些高频数值下载。服务还连接模拟磁照图索引、实时 quicklook 和 SGAMYA 信乐/峰山 quicklook 页面，并带有实时数据质量和使用限制说明。
desc_en: The WDC Kyoto geomagnetic field data service is the umbrella route for observatory field-data holdings at the World Data Center for Geomagnetism, Kyoto, distinct from the separate Dst, AE, ASY/SYM, and Q/D-day index rows. Catmap provides observatory metadata and availability searches, while caplot/hyplt provide hourly-value plotting and data output; in this phase a Kakioka/KAK January 2020 hourly request was directly verified to generate a WDC-format `.dat` data file. The mdplt and shplt pages provide official one-minute and one-second output forms and format documentation, but sampled KAK windows in 1995, 2000, 2010, and 2020 returned No Data or provisional-output messages, so this row does not overstate verified high-rate numeric downloads. The service also links analogue magnetogram indexes, real-time quicklook pages, and SGAMYA Shigaraki/Mineyama quicklook pages with quality and usage cautions.
source_type: world data center archive
evidence: WDC Kyoto Sec3 lists geomagnetic field data services and usage rules. The catmap page identifies online data collection status, observatory information, monthly/yearly available-data searches, weekly newly arrived data, and a PDF catalogue. The caplot page is titled Catalogue search and plot/output and exposes a POST /cgi-bin/caplot-cgi form for digital geomagnetic hourly, 1-minute, or 1-second values and analogue record images. The real-time quicklook page lists monthly pages from 2016 through current 2026 and states non-commercial monitoring-only use with possible inaccuracies. The SGAMYA page documents Shigaraki 1-second quicklook data from Apr 1995 to Apr 8 2018 and Mineyama from Jan 1994 to Apr 21 2021, while warning that some services are unavailable and artificial noise is not removed. In v102, hyplt/index.html was parsed and confirmed to expose GET /cgi-bin/hyplt-cgi with Station, date range, Components, Output=DATA, and WDC/IAGA output options. A KAK January 2020 hourly WDC request returned HTTP 200 after redirect to a generated WWW_hyplt*.dat file containing KAK20 monthly hourly records. mdplt/index.html and shplt/index.html expose analogous official minute/second forms and format pages, but KAK sample requests for 1995, 2000, 2010, and 2020 returned No Data or provisional-output messages; these were recorded as negative samples rather than positive downloads.
access_class: official observatory field-data catalogue/search/plot-output service with verified hourly CGI data output
scale: 1-second to hourly observatory records
feature_count: multiple observatory field data products
file_size: query-dependent

The GFZ datapub directory exposes annual ZIP files, readme, and change-log files, including packages from mag1991_def2015.zip through mag2020_def2020.zip, supporting offline bulk download and long-term citation workflows. This row refreshes the older IRDS 2018 entry; the INTERMAGNET page lists the 2020 DOI, but the DOI resolver returned 404 in this review, so the lychee-verified GFZ direct download directory is used as the canonical URL.

openness: open with INTERMAGNET data conditions and attribution/acknowledgement rules
source_type: packaged definitive observatory reference archive
evidence: GFZ datapub index for 10.5880.INTERMAGNET.1991.2020 lists annual ZIP archives mag1991_def2015.zip through mag2020_def2020.zip, change_log_IRDS2020.txt, and readme_INTERMAGNET_IRDS2020.txt. INTERMAGNET data-download page states that from 2015 onward the entire definitive dataset is updated and published annually as IRDS and lists IRDS 2020. Lychee confirms the GFZ download index and INTERMAGNET data-download page are alive; DOI resolver returned 404 and is not used as row URL. In v117, GFZ landing pages for IRDS 2016, 2017, 2018 and 2019 returned 200 and each linked to a browsable datapub directory under 10.5880.INTERMAGNET.1991.<year>; those directories list change_log_IRDS<year>.txt and annual ZIP files. Because row 71 already captures the later IRDS 2020 archive covering 1991-2020, the older IRDS cumulative releases were documented as deduplicated evidence rather than separate catalog rows.

The MAGDAS INDEX page states that MAGDAS INDEX data archives have been open to the public since April 2013, including Pc5 and EE/EDst/EU/EL products derived from MAGDAS/CPMN real-time data, with usage rules requiring contact, acknowledgement, references, and sharing copies of publications. The Kyushu MAGDAS project page documents the real-time magnetometer network context and planned/deployed low-latitude stations, including African candidate countries. name: NOAA Space Environment Monitor Science-Quality Magnetometer Data from GOES 8-15
provider: NOAA National Centers for Environmental Information

coverage: GOES-8 through GOES-15 geostationary satellite series
license: NOAA public data terms / free electronic downloads in most cases

doi_or_citation: NCEI metadata id gov.noaa.ncei.swx:goes_sem-magn-sci; DSI 2088_01
notes: Accepted as a historical science-quality reprocessing of GOES 8-15 SEM/MAG, distinct from both the GOES-R era archive and operational display products. Refreshed in v125 with direct online MAG directory evidence. The NCEI metadata page links the broad Direct Download root; the actual magnetometer science branch is /science/mag/. The README states daily NetCDF-4 product files and quality-control graphics for GOES-8 through GOES-15 full-resolution magnetometer observations, and notes that metadata for time variables mistakenly say 0.1-second resolution while the magnetic field data and relevant timestamps are actually 0.512-second resolution. XML metadata also says GOES SEM Level 1b magnetometer data are available via offline access only/contact NCEI, so the row now distinguishes online Level-2 high-resolution files and samples from offline/order-constrained Level-1b holdings. Probed direct satellite paths without /science/mag/ and guessed GOES-08 1995/04 and GOES-15 2020/03 month directories returned 404 and are excluded.
desc_zh: 该 NCEI 数据集提供 GOES 8-15 的 Space Environment Monitor 磁力计科学质量再处理数据。资料包括 reprocessed Level-1b 和 Level-2，最高 2 Hz 时间分辨率、重新计算均值、校准参数修正、质量标记更新、地球物理坐标矢量和完整星历信息。它覆盖 1994 年 4 月至 2020 年 3 月，是 GOES-R 之前地球同步空间磁场长期归档的重要补充。
desc_en: This NCEI dataset provides science-quality reprocessed Space Environment Monitor magnetometer data from GOES 8-15. It includes reprocessed Level-1b and Level-2 products with up to 2 Hz cadence, recomputed means, corrected calibration parameters, updated quality flags, geophysical coordinate vectors, and full ephemeris information. It covers April 1994 to March 2020 and complements the GOES-R era archive with a long historical geostationary magnetic-field record.
source_type: NOAA NCEI reprocessed satellite magnetometer archive
evidence: NCEI landing page and Geoportal HTML for gov.noaa.ncei.swx:goes_sem-magn-sci returned 200 and list NCEI Direct Download, formats gzip-tar/netCDF/CDF/text/PNG/PDF, 1994-04 to 2020-03 time period, and the GOES Space Weather Instruments resource. Geoportal JSON returned 200 with title NOAA Space Environment Monitor (SEM) Science-Quality Magnetometer (MAG) Data from GOES 8-15, source XML https://data.noaa.gov/waf/NOAA/NESDIS/NGDC/STP/Space_Weather/iso/xml/goes_sem-magn-sci.xml, sys_modified_dt 2026-06-24, and sys_xmlmodified_dt 2025-04-16. WAF XML returned 200 and states direct dataset files plus an offline/contact-NCEI note for GOES SEM Level 1b magnetometer access. The NCEI direct-download root https://www.ncei.noaa.gov/data/goes-space-environment-monitor/access/ returned 200 and lists science/. The science branch returned 200 and lists mag/. The MAG branch returned 200 and lists 1README.txt, docs/, goes08/ through goes15/, goes14_storage_mode_mag/, samples/, and special/. The README returned 200 and describes full-resolution GOES-8 through GOES-15 magnetometer observations, daily NetCDF-4 files, coordinate systems ECI/EPN/GSE/GSM/VDH, satellite location, and quality-control graphics. Representative directories returned 200: goes10/magn-l2-hires/2003/10/ lists daily NetCDF and PNG QC files; the sample file dn_magn-l2-hires_g10_d20031001_v0_0_5.nc returned HEAD 200 application/x-netcdf with content-length 8,835,093 bytes; samples/goes10/ and samples/goes12/ list sample daily NetCDF and QC PNGs. GOES-14 storage-mode branches list daily MAT files and a readme document. Negative probes: /access/goes08/, /access/l1b/, /access/l2/, guessed goes08/1995/04, and guessed goes15/2020/03 paths returned 404 and were excluded from verified evidence.

desc_en: INGV GEOMAG is the Italian geomagnetic observatory data portal, with observatory pages, comparison views, and a download area. Literature and indexed portal pages state that observations from stations such as Lampedusa, Duronia, and Castello Tesino are processed into 1-minute data and that definitive 1-minute magnetic-field data and local K indices can be downloaded through the portal. This row adds a direct Italian and Mediterranean national-observatory access point. v111 additionally confirms that the INGV/Roma site hosts a Terra Nova Bay (TNB) geomagnetic annual-report PDF archive: 13 PDFs under the modern `roma2.ingv.it/images/osservatori/annuariTNB/` path, spanning 2003-2005 through 2017-2018, passed lychee verification.
openness: open scientific access as documented by INGV portal/literature
source_type: national observatory data portal
evidence: Search-indexed INGV GEOMAG pages show Download Area and observatory records; peer-reviewed data availability statements say definitive 1-minute magnetic field data and local K indices are freely available/downloadable from geomag.rm.ingv.it. Lychee confirms the portal URL is alive. In v111, WDC /metadata/yearbooks records for TNB exposed six old roma2.rm.ingv.it annual PDF links for 2001-2009. The old links failed certificate verification in httpx, while a modern INGV path probe found 13 alive PDF files at roma2.ingv.it/images/osservatori/annuariTNB/. Curl HEAD samples for Annuario_2003-2005.pdf and Annuario_2017_2018.pdf returned HTTP 200, application/pdf, and Content-Length values of about 6.1 MB and 2.9 MB respectively; lychee verified all 13 selected positive PDF URLs.

feature_count: station source-data and K-index downloads by observatory/time

desc_en: GFZ Data Services publishes hourly mean H-component geomagnetic data from the Tatuoca (TTB, Brazil) and Huancayo (HUA, Peru) observatories for 1957-2019. The landing page documents curated and corrected inputs from Observatório Nacional, INTERMAGNET, WDC Edinburgh, and related sources, with files in IAGA-2002 format. The dataset is especially useful for long-term studies of equatorial daily variation, Sq/equatorial current systems, and geomagnetic response near the magnetic equator.

desc_en: The ESDB Earth's Magnetic Field Variations Database compiles variational minute values of the E, H, and Z components from 22 Russian geomagnetic observatories for 1983-2009. The data are stored at the World Data Center for Solar-Terrestrial Physics in Moscow, and the landing page states that they are freely accessible with a DOI and download directory. desc_zh: ESDB ULF wave index database 提供小时尺度 ULF 波功率指数，用于描述太阳风向高层大气能量传输的湍动性以及近地电磁场短周期变化。页面说明地面 ULF 指数由北半球全球磁台 1 分钟资料重建，地球同步和行星际 ULF 指数还使用 GOES、Wind、ACE、IMP8 等磁场/等离子体数据。该条作为地磁活动衍生指数数据库收录。
desc_en: The ESDB ULF wave index database provides hourly ULF wave power indices that characterize turbulent solar-wind energy transfer into the upper atmosphere and short-scale variability of near-Earth electromagnetic fields. The page states that the ground ULF index is reconstructed from 1-minute data from a worldwide Northern Hemisphere magnetic-station array, while geostationary and interplanetary ULF indices use GOES, Wind, ACE, IMP8, and related inputs. This row records it as a derived geomagnetic activity index database.
access_status: open DOI page with linked archive
openness: CC BY-NC 4.0; freely available per ESDB page
source_type: DOI repository derived geomagnetic index database
evidence: ESDB DOI page documents the hourly ULF wave power index, ground/geostationary/interplanetary sub-indices, 1991-2016 compilation with ongoing updates, free archive URL, DOI, and CC BY-NC 4.0 license.

feature_count: hourly ULF sub-indices and annual datasets

The landing page states that the catalogues are based on observations at multiple magnetic observatories and include storm occurrence time, duration, intensity, disturbance days/periods, and related solar active-region context. This row adds a long-term event-catalogue layer to the geomagnetic open-data atlas.

The documentation lists eight DMM sites, each with an under-line magnetometer and a nearby reference magnetometer; the under-line instrument contains the GIC magnetic signal plus environmental magnetic field, while the reference instrument is used to subtract the environmental field. Files are ASCII/TXT and are accessible through the Dataverse file tree or a 2.2 GB DownloadZIP.

The landing page states that observations use a Bartington Mag03 fluxgate magnetometer, span from 2020-01-29 to ongoing operation, and are recorded as 1-second values in IAGA-2002 format. desc_en: This Dryad dataset packages OMNIWeb solar-wind density, velocity, interplanetary magnetic-field parameters, and the SYM-H geomagnetic storm index for 2000-2020. The main xarr1.npy array stores magnetic-field, velocity, proton-density, and SYM-H columns, with train/validation/test storm split index files. It is a derived machine-learning and storm-prediction dataset rather than a replacement for OMNIWeb or Kyoto/ISGI index services.

desc_en: The GFZ HMC (Hourly Magnetospheric Currents) index measures large-scale magnetospheric current activity at Earth's surface for 1900-2015, emphasizing robust low-frequency variations such as solar-cycle periods. It is based on hourly vector magnetic-field means from 34 mid-latitude observatories from WDC Edinburgh and was manually revised for spikes, jumps, and drifts. The directory includes the HMC index and modified observatory data in IAGA-2002 ASCII format.

desc_zh: IMP 8 MAG/PLS 合并 1 分钟数据集将 15.36 秒 MAG 磁场数据与 MIT 1 分钟等离子体数据合并，提供磁场、等离子体和轨道/位置变量。OMNIWeb 页面说明该数据集由 GSFC/SPDF 于 2005 年创建，并在 2009 年用新版磁场数据更新；它不将时间平移到地球弓激波鼻点。该条使用 SPDF 直接目录作为主入口，并记录 OMNIWeb 可用于绘图、列表和输出文件生成。
desc_en: The IMP 8 MAG/PLS merged 1-minute dataset combines 15.36-second MAG magnetic-field data with MIT 1-minute plasma data and provides magnetic-field, plasma, and trajectory/position variables. OMNIWeb states that the dataset was created at GSFC/SPDF in 2005 and updated with version 3 magnetic-field data in 2009, with no time shift to Earth's bow-shock nose. This row uses the SPDF direct directory as the canonical URL and records OMNIWeb as the plotting/listing/output-file interface.

openness: NASA/SPDF public archive; government works/open access terms

Lychee confirms both SPDF directory and OMNIWeb page are alive.

desc_zh: 该 PDS 数据包归档 Apollo 16 ALSEP 月表磁力仪在 1975 年 4 月至 6 月获得的原始清理 ASCII 日文件。数据来自 NASA 原始 Apollo ALSEP ARCSAV 磁带，PDS 页面提供 DOI、时间范围、仪器/任务上下文，并在 PDS Geosciences 目录中提供 .tab 数据、XML 标签、清单和校验文件。它适合研究月表局地磁场、太阳风/月球相互作用以及历史 Apollo 原位磁测资料的再处理。
desc_en: This PDS bundle archives raw cleaned ASCII daily files from the Apollo 16 ALSEP Lunar Surface Magnetometer for April-June 1975. The data were extracted from NASA Apollo ALSEP ARCSAV archive tapes, with PDS bundle metadata providing the DOI, mission/instrument context, time span, direct data directory, XML labels, inventory, and checksum manifest. It is useful for lunar-surface magnetic-field studies and reanalysis of historical Apollo in situ measurements.
source_type: NASA/PDS lunar surface magnetometer mission archive

The PDS Geosciences directory exposes bundle.xml, readme.txt, data/, document/, md5 manifest, 90 daily .tab science files plus XML labels and collection_inventory.csv; lychee confirms the canonical PDS bundle URL is alive.

desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集是 Peter J. Chi 发布的 Apollo 月表磁力仪恢复版 Release 1，源自 NASA NSSDCA 保存的 Apollo correction tapes。数据将 Apollo 12、15、16 月表磁力仪 0.3 秒矢量磁场样本解码为 ASCII 列表，字段包括时间和 ALSEP 坐标系下的 Bx、By、Bz（nT），并以 CC BY 4.0 开放发布。它为月表等离子体波、磁尾环境和 Apollo 历史磁测资料复用提供了可引用的现代 DOI 入口。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset is Peter J. Chi's Release 1 restoration of Apollo Lunar Surface Magnetometer data derived from Apollo correction tapes archived at NASA NSSDCA. It decodes 0.3-second vector magnetic-field samples from Apollo 12, 15, and 16 into ASCII listings with time fields and Bx/By/Bz in nT in ALSEP coordinates, under CC BY 4.0 terms. It provides a modern DOI-backed access point for reuse in lunar plasma-wave, magnetotail, and historical Apollo magnetic-field studies.

desc_zh: SuperDARN Canada 的 FITACF 3.0 下载服务面向 Saskatoon、Clyde River、Inuvik、Rankin Inlet 和 Prince George 等加拿大管理雷达，提供按日期和雷达选择的高频相干散射雷达处理数据。页面说明文件命名、RST make_fit 处理版本、数据库存检查和宽波束降采样数据提示，并要求在论文中致谢 SuperDARN 与相关 PI。该服务不是磁力仪观测，但对研究地磁扰动期间的电离层对流、极光区电动力学和磁层-电离层耦合非常关键。
desc_en: The SuperDARN Canada FITACF 3.0 download service provides date- and radar-selected processed HF coherent-scatter radar files for the Canadian-managed Saskatoon, Clyde River, Inuvik, Rankin Inlet, and Prince George radars. The page documents file naming, RST make_fit processing, inventory checking, and downsampled wide-beam availability, with SuperDARN acknowledgement and PI contact expectations. Although not a magnetometer product, it is a core geospace dataset for ionospheric convection and magnetosphere-ionosphere coupling during geomagnetic activity.
source_type: operational SuperDARN radar data download service
evidence: SuperDARN Canada data-download page states that users select a YYYY-MM-DD date and radar to download FITACF 3.0 files for SuperDARN Canada managed radars, lists Saskatoon, Rankin Inlet, Clyde River, Prince George, and Inuvik as radar options, describes the RST 5.0 make_fit processing with fitacf-version 3.0, gives the filename pattern YYYYMMDD.hhmm.ss.(radar code).fitacf.bz2, links to FITACF documentation, and gives required acknowledgement/citation language; lychee confirms the URL is alive.

feature_count: radar/date/file dependent
file_size: individual compressed FITACF files, query-dependent

desc_en: The FRDR SuperDARN collection aggregates annual SuperDARN RAWACF/DAT datasets, with visible records for 2023, 2022, 2021, 2020, 2019, and multiple historical years. RAWACF is closer to the radar processing source stream and is useful for reprocessing, FITACF-version comparisons, ionospheric convection studies, space-weather analysis, and geomagnetic-storm research. This row catalogs the collection-level repository route rather than exploding every annual dataset into separate rows.

notes: Accepted as a derived magnetospheric plasma-density product from IMAGE RPI, distinct from RPI plasmagram/spectrogram key parameters. It supports geomagnetic-context studies by mapping electron density along the spacecraft orbit through the plasmasphere and magnetosphere.
desc_zh: IMAGE RPI 电子密度沿轨产品由 Radio Plasma Imager 动态谱自动拟合并在必要时人工校正得到，给出 IMAGE 航天器轨道上的电子数密度估计。CDF 元数据说明密度来自上混杂共振、Z 模或连续谱边界等谱线识别，并提示部分连续谱边界推断值仍具有不确定性。该产品可用于地磁活动期间等离子体层和磁层密度结构、波传播环境以及磁层-电离层耦合研究。
desc_en: The IMAGE RPI electron-density-along-orbit product derives electron number density from Radio Plasma Imager dynamic spectra using automated fitting with manual correction when needed. The CDF metadata describes fitting to upper-hybrid resonance, Z-mode, or continuum-edge features and notes that some continuum-edge density estimates remain tentative. The product is useful for plasmaspheric and magnetospheric density structure, wave-propagation context, and magnetosphere-ionosphere coupling studies during geomagnetic activity.
source_type: NASA/SPDF IMAGE Radio Plasma Imager data product
evidence: CDAWeb dataset registry lists IM_ELECTRON_DENSITY_RPI with DOI 10.48322/awms-1e38, SPASE ID spase://NASA/NumericalData/IMAGE/RPI/PT1M, label IMAGE RPI electron density along the spacecraft orbit, PI R. E. Denton and B.W. Reinisch, and temporal coverage 2001-01-01 to 2005-12-18. CDF global attributes describe density values derived from IMAGE RPI data using automated fitting with manual correction, upper-hybrid/Z-mode/continuum-edge methods, acknowledgement of CDAWeb/SPDF and providers, and rules-of-use caveats; lychee confirms the SPASE URL and SPDF directory are alive.

The data are useful for magnetospheric radio/plasma-wave studies, plasmaspheric boundary analysis, cavity structure, and propagation-condition changes during geomagnetic disturbances.

The service action routes users to INTERMAGNET; in this pass, the BGS GIN/INTERMAGNET service returned tested IAGA-2002 one-minute provisional VSS data with ON and GFZ source information, station metadata, IAGA code VSS, and XYZF fields. This row captures the Brazilian national service entry and its verified INTERMAGNET download path.

IUGONET metadata helped identify the station records and marks AccessRights Open/Format CDF, while ERG-SC and ISEE DOI pages provide stable landing/download routes. desc_zh: ISEE/ERG-SC 64 Hz 地面 induction magnetometer 网络提供多个高纬和中低纬站点的三分量 H/D/Z 地磁变化数据，数据以 CDF 小时粒度文件在 ERG Science Center 公开目录中分发。ERG-SC 页面说明这些地面观测数据可下载、分析和绘图，适配 SPEDAS/TDAS 与 ERGWAT；ISEE DOI 页面为各站点提供引用、数据下载目录和相关论文。抽样目录显示 Athabasca、Husafell、Muntinlupa、Rikubetsu 等站点存在真实 CDF 文件，部分目录更新到 2026 年。
desc_en: The ISEE/ERG-SC 64 Hz ground induction magnetometer network provides three-component H/D/Z geomagnetic-field variations from multiple high-, mid-, and low-latitude stations. Data are distributed as hourly CDF files in public ERG Science Center directories. ERG-SC states that the ground-based data can be downloaded, analyzed, and plotted with SPEDAS/TDAS and ERGWAT, while ISEE DOI pages provide station-level citations, download directories, and related publications. Sampled directories expose real CDF files for stations such as Athabasca, Husafell, Muntinlupa, and Rikubetsu, with some holdings current into 2026.
access_status: open public directory and DOI landing pages
openness: open access with rules-of-the-road citation and acknowledgement requirements
source_type: official university/ERG Science Center data archive
evidence: ERG-SC ground data page lists ISEE Induction Magnetometers and a CDF directory; station DOI pages describe 64 Hz three-component induction magnetometer CDF data and link to ERG-SC directories; sampled station/month directories expose hourly .cdf files such as isee_induction_ath_2026060100_v01.cdf.

feature_count: 18 station directories observed under ERG-SC induction root; hourly CDF granules by station/year/month

access: ERG-SC ground-based observation page, station DOI landing pages, and direct HTTPS directory indexes/downloads

time_span: Station- and cadence-dependent; sampled directories show 1 sec/1 min products from 1990s through 2026 and Lucky Lake 64 Hz products current into 2026
notes: Accepted as a concrete ground fluxgate magnetometer product-family row. It is adjacent to but distinct from the v094 64 Hz induction magnetometer network: this row records fluxgate sensors and the ERG-SC fluxgate directory tree. Station/cadence-specific DOI rows can be split later if finer granularity is needed.
desc_zh: ISEE/ERG-SC 地面 fluxgate magnetometer 网络提供多个站点的三分量 H/D/Z 地磁场变化数据，公开目录按 64 Hz、1 sec 和 1 min 采样率组织。ERG-SC 页面把这些数据列为可下载、可分析和可绘图的 ground-based observation data，站点 DOI 页面提供数据引用、下载目录和使用致谢信息。抽样验证显示 Lucky Lake 64 Hz 小时 CDF、Kagoshima 1 秒日 CDF、Moshiri 1 分钟日 CDF 等文件可直接访问，部分数据更新到 2026 年。
desc_en: The ISEE/ERG-SC ground fluxgate magnetometer network provides three-component H/D/Z geomagnetic-field variations from multiple stations, organized in public directories by 64 Hz, 1 second, and 1 minute cadences. ERG-SC lists these as downloadable, analyzable, and plottable ground-based observation data, while station DOI pages provide citations, download directories, and acknowledgement guidance. Sample checks confirmed direct access to Lucky Lake 64 Hz hourly CDF files, Kagoshima 1-second daily CDF files, and Moshiri 1-minute daily CDF files, with some holdings current into 2026.
access_status: open public directory and DOI landing pages
openness: open access with rules-of-the-road citation and acknowledgement requirements
source_type: official university/ERG Science Center data archive
evidence: ERG-SC ground data page lists ISEE Fluxgate Magnetometers and CDF branches for 64 Hz, 1 sec, and 1 min products; station DOI pages describe fluxgate H/D/Z magnetic-field data and link to ERG-SC directories; sampled directories expose real CDF files such as isee_fluxgate_64hz_lcl_2026060100_v01.cdf, isee_fluxgate_1sec_kag_20260101_v01.cdf, and isee_fluxgate_1min_msr_20260101_v01.cdf.

license: ERG-SC and MAGDAS rules of the road; cite/acknowledge MAGDAS/CPMN/I-SPES Kyushu University and relevant station/data providers
formats: CDF files in station/year directories; daily 1-second CDF granules; ERG-SC directory index; related MAGDAS-DB data request and index pages
access: Direct ERG-SC HTTPS directory indexes/downloads plus MAGDAS-DB project/request context

time_span: Station-dependent; sampled ERG-SC mirror directories include 2005-2017 station/year holdings, with examples AMA 2013, MUT 2016, and ASB 2017

The mirror is not the full MAGDAS-DB service; it exposes selected 1-second CDF station/year directories under ERG-SC. Some guessed station/year paths returned 404 and were excluded from positive evidence.
desc_zh: ERG-SC 的 MAGDAS 1 秒 CDF 镜像是 MAGDAS/CPMN 地面磁力计数据的一条直接下载路径，目录按站点和年份组织，提供日 CDF 文件。与已有 MAGDAS-DB 总门户不同，该条记录聚焦 ERG-SC 上可直接访问的 `magdas/1sec/` 镜像；抽样验证了 ASB 2017、MUT 2016、AMA 2013 等站点/年份目录及真实 CDF 文件。该镜像覆盖范围是选择性数据子集，完整数据申请和指数产品仍应参考 MAGDAS-DB。
desc_en: The ERG-SC MAGDAS 1-second CDF mirror is a direct-download route for selected MAGDAS/CPMN ground magnetometer data. The directory is organized by station and year and exposes daily CDF files. Unlike the existing MAGDAS-DB portal row, this entry focuses on the directly accessible `magdas/1sec/` mirror at ERG-SC; sampled evidence confirms real CDF files for ASB 2017, MUT 2016, and AMA 2013. The mirror is a selected subset, while full data requests and derived index products remain documented through MAGDAS-DB.
access_status: open public ERG-SC directory mirror; broader MAGDAS observations request-mediated through MAGDAS-DB
openness: direct open mirror subset with rules-of-the-road citation/acknowledgement; broader data request workflow
source_type: official ERG Science Center data mirror and project database context
evidence: ERG-SC ground data page lists MAGDAS/CPMN and a 1 sec CDF directory; ERG-SC magdas/1sec root exposes station directories; sampled ASB 2017, MUT 2016, and AMA 2013 directories expose daily CDF files such as magdas_1sec_asb_20170101_v01.cdf, magdas_1sec_mut_20160101_v01.cdf, and magdas_1sec_ama_20130315_v01.cdf. MAGDAS-DB remains the authoritative project portal and data request/index context.

feature_count: 16 station directories observed under ERG-SC magdas/1sec root; station/year directories with daily CDF granules where present

time_span: Station- and cadence-dependent; official MM210 page shows 1-min availability beginning in 1990, and ERG-SC sampled Kagoshima 1 sec/1 min directories extend into 2026

desc_zh: ERG-SC 的 MM210 CDF 归档提供 210 磁经线地面磁力计网络的 1 秒和 1 分钟地磁数据，目录按采样率、站点和年份组织。官方 MM210 页面给出站点表、月度可用性和用户说明，ERG-SC Readme 明确数据使用需联系 PI、协商署名并引用 Yumoto 等论文。抽样验证显示 Kagoshima 2026 年 1 秒和 1 分钟日 CDF 文件可直接访问，历史 1 分钟站点目录也长期存在。
desc_en: The ERG-SC MM210 CDF archive provides 1-second and 1-minute ground magnetometer data from the 210-degree magnetic meridian network, organized by cadence, station, and year. The official MM210 page provides station metadata, monthly availability, and user notes, while ERG-SC Readme files require contacting the PI, discussing authorship, and citing the Yumoto network papers. Sample checks confirmed direct access to Kagoshima 2026 daily CDF files for both 1-second and 1-minute data, with long-running historical 1-minute station directories also present.
access_status: open public ERG-SC CDF directory with rules-of-the-road publication requirements
openness: open direct download; scholarly use requires PI contact, citation, acknowledgement, and possible coauthorship discussion
source_type: official ERG Science Center data archive and MM210 project pages
evidence: ERG-SC ground data page lists 210 MM and links to 1 sec CDF and 1 min/1 h CDF; mm210 root exposes 1sec and 1min branches; Readme files state the rules of the road; sampled Kagoshima directories expose daily CDF files such as mm210_1sec_kag_20260101_v01.cdf and mm210_1min_kag_20260101_v01.cdf. The MM210 project page provides station table and monthly availability.

file_size: sample daily 1-second CDF files about 0.9-1.1 MB; sample daily 1-minute files tens of KB

name: MAGDAS EE-index EDst/EU/EL Monthly HTML Data Archive
provider: Space Environment Research Center / I-SPES, Kyushu University
theme_canonical: ground magnetic indices; equatorial electrojet; derived geomagnetic index
theme_raw: MAGDAS EE-index; EDst; EU; EL; realtime version; monthly plot and data pages
coverage: Equatorial and low-latitude MAGDAS/CPMN station network; EDst nightside station composite plus EU/EL station products for AAB, BCL, ANC, DAV, EUS, ILR, LKW, TIR, and YAP
license: MAGDAS INDEX data usage rules: contact principal investigator before publication, discuss co-authorship, acknowledge MAGDAS/CPMN and Kyushu University, and cite recommended references
formats: HTML monthly numeric tables, JPEG quick-look/plot images, PDF methodology/reference documents
access: Public EE-index top page with Quick Look, EDst monthly Plot and Data pages, EU/EL station monthly Plot and Data pages, and PDF documentation
doi_or_citation: Uozumi et al. (2008, 2009, 2016) MAGDAS/EE-index references listed by Kyushu University MAGDAS INDEX pages
time_span: Monthly pages observed from 2005 through current 2026 listings; exact completeness varies by product/station and realtime pages use 999 as missing value marker
notes: Accepted in v098 as an independent public derived-index data service because EDst and EU/EL monthly pages expose numeric hourly tables directly in HTML, not only plots. It complements the broader MAGDAS-DB portal/request row and the ERG-SC MAGDAS CDF mirror row. Pc5 pages were reviewed in the same pass but left under MAGDAS-DB context because only current/10-day/27-day display pages and images were found, with no comparable monthly numeric archive route. V120 reviewed Zenodo DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20839883 as a separate event-derived HUA-KOU EEJ index dataset for 1 January 2025; it is documented as a distinct manuscript-supporting file rather than merged into this broader service/source-data row.
seen_in_passes: v098 MAGDAS public index deep review; data.i-spes.kyushu-u.ac.jp magdasindex -> eeindex -> QuickLook/EDst/EUEL monthly pages; v120 HUA-KOU EEJ Zenodo dedup boundary
desc_zh: MAGDAS EE-index 是九州大学 I-SPES/SERC 公开发布的派生地磁指数服务，面向赤道电喷流监测，包含 EDst 以及 EU/EL 产品。站点提供按月组织的 Quick Look、EDst Plot and Data、以及 AAB/BCL/ANC/DAV/EUS/ILR/LKW/TIR/YAP 等台站的 EU/EL Plot and Data 页面；抽查的 2025、2026 月页在 HTML 中直接给出逐日逐小时的 nT 数值表，并用 999 表示缺测或无效值。使用需遵守 MAGDAS INDEX 数据规则，包括联系 PI、致谢和引用建议文献。
desc_en: The MAGDAS EE-index service is a public derived geomagnetic-index archive from Kyushu University I-SPES/SERC for equatorial electrojet monitoring. It publishes Quick Look pages plus monthly EDst and station-level EU/EL Plot and Data pages for stations such as AAB, BCL, ANC, DAV, EUS, ILR, LKW, TIR, and YAP. Sampled 2025 and 2026 pages expose hourly numeric nT tables directly in HTML, with 999 used as a missing or invalid marker. Use is governed by MAGDAS INDEX rules requiring PI contact, acknowledgement, and citation of recommended references.
access_status: open web access with usage rules; no login observed for monthly HTML tables
openness: open access / attribution and PI-contact rules
source_type: official derived index data service
evidence: The MAGDAS INDEX top page states the index data archives have been open to the public since April 2013 and describes EE index products EDst, EU, and EL. The EE-index top page links to Quick Look, EDst, EU/EL station pages, and PDFs. EDst monthly pages such as 202606.html and 202501.html return HTTP 200 and contain EDst1h numeric hourly tables in nT. EU/EL station monthly pages such as AAB/202606.html and YAP/202606.html return HTTP 200 and contain EU, EL hourly tables in nT. QuickLook monthly pages expose JPEG plot pages. Pc5 pages were separately checked and found to expose current/10-day/27-day display images without a monthly numeric data archive route. V120 dedup boundary: Zenodo record 20839883 contains a small CC-BY-4.0 text file of 1-minute HUA-KOU EEJ values for one geomagnetic storm and is not treated as a duplicate of this broader data service/source record.
access_class: public HTML numeric data archive / official derived index service
scale: monthly hourly derived index tables across equatorial/low-latitude MAGDAS/CPMN stations

name: WDC Kyoto ASY/SYM and AE Plot/Data Output Service
provider: World Data Center for Geomagnetism, Kyoto / Kyoto University
theme_canonical: geomagnetic indices; ASY/SYM; AE; mid-latitude disturbance indices
theme_raw: ASY/SYM and AE plot and data output; WDC-like ASY/SYM; compressed PostScript monthly plot archive
coverage: Global mid-latitude ASY/SYM indices and auroral electrojet AE indices served by WDC Kyoto; ASY/SYM page states coverage from 1981 onward
license: WDC Kyoto data usage rules / ICSU-WDS data sharing principles; scientific use without restrictions, with contact requested for real-time quicklook publication use
formats: GET CGI plot/data service, WDC-like ASY/SYM and AE format documentation, IAGA2002-like output option, compressed PostScript plot files (.ps.Z and .ps.gz) in monthly directories, PDF ASY/SYM documentation
access: Public WDC Kyoto aeasy CGI plot/data output page plus browsable ASY/SYM PostScript plot directories and format documentation
doi_or_citation: WDC Kyoto ASY/SYM documentation; Ann. Geophysicae 14, 608-618, 1996 reference listed in ASY/SYM format page
time_span: ASY/SYM from 1981 onward according to WDC Kyoto aeasy page; sampled asyplot directories verified for 1981-01, 2000-01, and 2020-01
notes: Accepted in v099 as a distinct WDC Kyoto ASY/SYM access route not covered by the existing Kyoto Dst row or AE portal row. The aeasy landing page provides a GET form for plot/data output with Output=ASY and WDC-like/IAGA2002 options, plus ASY/SYM format documentation. Direct CGI sample requests for a few dates returned No Data during this pass, so positive file evidence emphasizes the browsable ASY/SYM compressed PostScript plot archive and official format/documentation pages rather than claiming every CGI parameter sample was successful.
seen_in_passes: v099 WDC Kyoto ASY/SYM deep review; WDC Sec3 -> aeasy -> format pages -> asyplot monthly directories
desc_zh: WDC Kyoto 的 aeasy 服务提供 ASY/SYM 与 AE 指数的绘图和数据输出入口，其中 ASY/SYM 页面标注覆盖自 1981 年起。页面包含 GET CGI 表单，可选择 ASY and SYM output、WDC-like 或 IAGA2002-like 输出格式，并提供 ASY/SYM 固定宽度格式说明和 PDF 文档。另有 `asyplot/` 可浏览目录，抽查的 1981-01、2000-01、2020-01 月目录均能访问压缩 PostScript 图文件。由于本轮若干 CGI 抽样日期返回 No Data，本条将其记录为官方 plot/data 输出服务和直接可下载 plot archive，而不夸大为已验证任意日期数值下载。
desc_en: WDC Kyoto aeasy is the official plot and data output service for ASY/SYM and AE indices, with the ASY/SYM page stating coverage from 1981 onward. The page exposes a GET CGI form with ASY and SYM output plus WDC-like and IAGA2002-like format choices, and it publishes fixed-width ASY/SYM format documentation and a PDF note. A browsable `asyplot/` archive provides directly downloadable compressed PostScript plot files; sampled monthly directories for 1981-01, 2000-01, and 2020-01 were accessible. Because several direct CGI test dates returned No Data in this pass, this entry records the verified official plot/data service and plot-file archive without overstating arbitrary numeric-query success.
access_status: open web access; CGI output and directory downloads available without login, with WDC usage rules
openness: open scientific use / WDC usage rules
source_type: official geomagnetic index plot/data service
evidence: WDC Kyoto Geomagnetic Data Service links to aeasy as Data plot/download for ASY/SYM and AE. The aeasy page states ASY/SYM [1981-], exposes a GET form at /cgi-bin/aeasy-cgi with Output choices PLOT, AE, ASY and WDC-like/IAGA2002 formats, and links to ASY/SYM format documentation, ASY/SYM PDF, and ASY/SYM PostScript plot files. The ASY/SYM format page describes ASYSYM one-minute fixed-width records and missing value 99999. The asyplot directory exposes monthly folders and sampled compressed PostScript files such as 810101-02.ps.Z, 000101-02.ps.Z, and 200101-02.ps.gz.
access_class: official CGI plot/data service + direct compressed PostScript plot directory archive
scale: one-minute ASY/SYM indices from 1981 onward; monthly plot directories with two-day compressed PostScript files

name: WDC Kyoto International Q-Days and D-Days List Service
provider: World Data Center for Geomagnetism, Kyoto / Kyoto University; derived by GFZ Potsdam from Kp index
theme_canonical: geomagnetic indices; quiet days; disturbed days; Kp-derived monthly selections
theme_raw: International 5 and 10 quietest days and 5 most disturbed days; Q-Days; D-Days; qddays CGI list
coverage: Monthly international Q-Days and D-Days lists from 1932 onward, derived from Kp index and served by WDC Kyoto
license: WDC Kyoto data usage rules / ICSU-WDS data sharing principles; scientific use without restrictions, with WDC Kyoto restrictions for commercial applications of geomagnetic indices
formats: HTML/Preformatted CGI text output, fixed-width year/month quiet/disturbed day list format, format documentation page
access: Public WDC Kyoto qddays landing page and POST CGI list output for selected start/end years
doi_or_citation: WDC Kyoto qddays service; GFZ Potsdam Kp/Q-days and D-days derivation context
time_span: 1932 onward; sampled CGI outputs verified for 1932, 2020-2021, and 2025
notes: Accepted in v100 as a distinct WDC Kyoto data-output service not currently represented by existing ISGI or GFZ Kp rows. The landing page states the international 5 and 10 quietest days and 5 most disturbed days from 1932 onward, now derived by GFZ Potsdam from Kp. POST requests to /cgi-bin/qddays-cgi returned monthly fixed-width Q/D-day lists for 1932, 2020-2021, and 2025 during this review.
seen_in_passes: v100 WDC Kyoto qddays review; WDC Sec3 -> qddays landing -> qddays format -> qddays-cgi POST samples
desc_zh: WDC Kyoto 的 International Q-Days and D-Days 服务提供自 1932 年以来每月国际 5 个/10 个最安静日和 5 个最扰动日列表，页面说明这些日期目前由 GFZ Potsdam 基于 Kp 指数推导。服务包含公开 landing page、格式说明页，以及可按起止年份提交的 `qddays-cgi` 输出。抽查的 1932、2020-2021 和 2025 年请求均返回包含年月、q1-q0 与 d1-d5 的固定宽度文本表。该条目补充的是 Q/D-day 月度选择数据服务，不替代 GFZ Kp/ap/Ap 指数主产品。
desc_en: The WDC Kyoto International Q-Days and D-Days service provides monthly lists of the international 5 and 10 quietest days and 5 most disturbed days from 1932 onward. The landing page states that the lists are now derived by GFZ Potsdam from the Kp index. It offers a public landing page, a fixed-width format description, and a `qddays-cgi` POST output service by start and end year. Sample requests for 1932, 2020-2021, and 2025 returned monthly tables with year, month, q1-q0 quiet-day rankings, and d1-d5 disturbed-day rankings. This row captures the Q/D-day selection service rather than duplicating the main GFZ Kp/ap/Ap index product.
access_status: open web access; POST CGI output available without login
openness: open scientific use / WDC usage rules
source_type: official geomagnetic index list service
evidence: WDC Kyoto Geomagnetic Data Service links qddays as Data download. The qddays landing page states international 5 and 10 quietest and 5 most disturbed days [1932-], derived by GFZ Potsdam from Kp index, and exposes a POST form to /cgi-bin/qddays-cgi. The format page defines columns for year, month, q1-q5, q6-q0, and d1-d5. POST samples returned QDDAYS preformatted lists for 1932, 2020-2021, and 2025.
access_class: official POST CGI text list service / format-documented index archive
scale: monthly Q/D-day selections from 1932 onward; about 0.5 KB per year according to WDC Kyoto page
file_size: about 0.5 KB/year listed by WDC Kyoto

desc_zh: BGS Global Geomagnetic Survey Data API 是 WDC Edinburgh 提供的全球地磁调查/复测站数据接口，区别于连续观测站分钟、小时或月均值时间序列。API 可按时间范围和经纬度框筛选，并可选择是否包含 one-off、repeat station、aeromagnetic、marine、satellite 和 observatory 等类型。v104 抽查 2025 年苏格兰北部小范围请求，JSON 和 CSV 均返回 THURSO、LOCH ERIBOLL 等复测站记录，字段包含 D、I、H、X、Y、Z、F、海拔、国家、源代码和来源说明。该数据适合区域主磁场约束、复测站变化分析和模型验证。
desc_en: The BGS Global Geomagnetic Survey Data API is a WDC Edinburgh interface for global magnetic survey and repeat-station observations, distinct from continuous observatory minute, hourly, or monthly time series. The endpoint can be filtered by date range and geographic bounding box, with switches for one-off, repeat-station, aeromagnetic, marine, satellite, and observatory records. In v104, a small northern Scotland 2025 query returned JSON and CSV records for sites such as THURSO and LOCH ERIBOLL, with D, I, H, X, Y, Z, F, altitude, country, source codes, and source descriptions. The service is useful for regional main-field constraints, repeat-station change studies, and model validation.

evidence: The BGS magnetic survey data form describes retrieval of magnetic survey data from 1900 to present and links to the WDC API. The WDC OpenAPI schema documents /global-geomagnetic-survey with start_dt/end_dt, bounding-box parameters, file_format=json/csv/geo-json, and switches for one-off, aeromag, marine vector/scalar, satellite, repeat-station and observatory data. A 2025 query over 58-59 N and 350-360 E returned application/json with dataset Global Survey Data and three repeat-station records; the same query with file_format=csv returned text/csv with station, year, latitude, longitude, d, i, h, x, y, z, f, source and description fields.

feature_count: sample query returned 3 records; full database size depends on filters
file_size: sample JSON 6.6 KB; sample CSV 5.6 KB

desc_en: The BGS Geomagnetic Monthly Bulletins PDF Catalogue is a British Geological Survey archive of monthly geomagnetic observatory bulletins for nine UK and overseas observatories, including Lerwick, Eskdalemuir, Hartland, Ascension Island, Port Stanley, Sable Island, Jim Carrigan Observatory, King Edward Point, and Fort McMurray. The station pages are populated from a live `catalogue.json` file that lists PDFs by station, year, and month; v106 counted 1,962 entries and verified representative old and recent PDFs as valid PDF responses. The bulletins provide rapid access to provisional observatory results and are useful for monthly station context, plots, quality notes, and summarized values. desc_en: The BGS Geomagnetic Observatory Yearbooks and Historical Articles PDF Archive provides scanned geomagnetic observatory yearbooks and related historical articles from the British Geological Survey. It covers current and historical UK observatories as well as former British colonial observatories such as Cape of Good Hope, Colaba/Bombay, Hobarton, St. Helena, Singapore, and Toronto, with overall coverage back to the 1840s and into the early 2000s. In v106, 15 observatory pages yielded 375 unique `YBpdf` files, and representative Kew, Colaba, and Toronto PDFs were verified as directly accessible. The archive is useful for literature/scanned-yearbook access to early magnetic observations, instrument context, and historical observatory metadata.
